---
pagetitle: "Tools | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Decision-support tools developed by Dr Mesfin Genie: eMANDEVAL for vaccine-mandate policy, the SOIL CRC benefit-cost tool, and the STEPS FETP scale-up decision aid."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Tools</p>
<h1>Decision-support tools</h1>
<p>Interactive applications that turn preference and economic evidence into analysis that decision-makers can use directly. Each page explains the problem, the users, the inputs and outputs, and the method behind the tool.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">
<div class="tool-page-grid">
<article class="tool-page-card"><div class="tool-meta">Vaccine policy</div><h2>eMANDEVAL Future</h2><p>Compares vaccine-mandate designs by predicted public support, expected health outcomes, and benefit-cost trade-offs.</p><a class="button-secondary" href="/tools/emandeval/">About this tool</a></article>
<article class="tool-page-card"><div class="tool-meta">Economic evaluation</div><h2>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h2><p>Net present value, benefit-cost ratio, and sensitivity analysis for agricultural production trials.</p><a class="button-secondary" href="/tools/soil-crc-bca/">About this tool</a></article>
<article class="tool-page-card"><div class="tool-meta">Field epidemiology</div><h2>STEPS FETP Scale-up Decision Aid</h2><p>Endorsement, perceived programme value, and costs for scaling Field Epidemiology Training Programmes in India.</p><a class="button-secondary" href="/tools/steps/">About this tool</a></article>
</div>
</div></section>
```
